title: The Jungle Book
desc: Mowgli, a young boy raised by wolves, embarks on thrilling adventures with his loyal companions, Baloo the bear and Bagheera the panther, learning life lessons along the way.

title: Naagmani
desc: A shapeshifting serpent couple takes rebirth in order to complete their love story, unaware of a threat that has followed them.

title: Crime Alert
desc: The host presents a collection of true stories involving ordinary citizens who committed horrific crimes for the sake of love, revenge and various other motivating factors.

title: Bindiya Sarkar
desc: An uneducated orphan girl agrees to marry a man from Lucknow. However, things take a turn when she suddenly finds herself becoming the chief minister of Uttar Pradesh.

title: Shubh Shagun
desc: Shubh and Shagun, two individuals from different social backgrounds, decide to marry each other for the sake of their respective siblings' happiness.

title: Ramayan
desc: Rama, the brave prince of Ayodhya, sets out to rescue his wife Sita from an evil Ravana, facing an ultimate test of loyalty.
